name: xf_cep_c_del_churn_exists
_finding: CLASS 3 (item C): external DELETE of the sole exists-witness + insert of a fresh witness in the SAME epoch. External delete is IMMEDIATE (on_delete), so it un-fires exists; the same-epoch insert re-fires it -> Drools fires NE twice. The engine keeps exists linked across the churn -> fires once. engine: NE ; oracle: NE NE. C-SPECIFIC: the EXPIRATION analog (expire the witness + insert) PASSES on both (exp_churn_exists — expiration retraction defers/nets out, D-102). Controls: delete-only (no reinsert) PASSES (d2); not-CE variant PASSES (d4).
drl: rule NE when exists E0() P() then end
